description: Generous baseline budget for the 2026-06-18 ten-minute eight-bot mm-rage frame-command soak.

duration_sec.description: Expected ten-minute soak with room for local timing variance.

bot_count.description: This budget is scoped to the eight-bot soak.

commands_per_bot_sec.description: Detects severe command starvation or runaway duplicate command submission.

route_queries_per_bot_sec.description: Derived route-query pressure budget from the current baseline plus slack.

route_refresh_ratio.description: Route refreshes should remain well below total route requests.

route_reuse_ratio.description: Route cache reuse should remain a meaningful share of route requests.

debug_work_units_per_bot_sec.description: Debug overlay pressure proxy while route and goal debug are enabled.

recovery_command_uses_per_bot_sec.description: Recovery command churn budget with headroom over the first soak baseline.

progress_reports.description: Ten-minute soak should report roughly once per minute.

commands.description: Raw final status command count should show sustained bot command throughput.

route_commands.description: Raw final status route command count should show sustained route steering.

route_failures.description: No route failures are acceptable for this baseline smoke.

route_invalid_slots.description: No invalid route slots should be observed.

route_debug_missing_frames.description: Route debug output should keep pace with route command frames.

skipped_inactive.description: All eight bots should stay active through the soak.
